calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-14-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name for an Adult and of a Minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: James Robertson, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288

Petitioner Qing Hong Li present in pro per for self and as guardian ad litem for the minor Jincheng Mei.
Co-Petitioner Cai Sheng Mei (father) present in pro per, consented to the name change of the minor on the record.
Parties were placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication is in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of names were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to Sophia Li and Change of Name for the Minor to Jason Chen.
Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-03-2012 Reset To Jun-14-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: Uncontested Calendar of MAY-03-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME Continued to JUN-14-2012 at 9:00 AM in Dept. 514. The Court orders that the petitioner do search for father and file declaration of attempts with the court. Per the Court, petitioner does not have to republish in local newspaper(s). Appearance by petitioner, assisted by cantonese interpreter Jieying Ming. Judge: Doanld j. Sullivan. Clerk: S. Vantree. Reporter: S. Wong # 11228.

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Mar-28-2012 Text Ruling
